original_question: A very special island is inhabited only by knights and knaves. Knights always tell the truth, and knaves always lie. You meet 4 inhabitants: Sophia, Emma, Grace, and Matthew. Sophia said, "If Grace is a knave then Emma is a knight." "Sophia is a knight," Emma claimed. "Matthew is a knight," Grace mentioned. Matthew was heard saying, "Emma is a knight if and only if Sophia is a knight". So who is a knight and who is a knave?
